creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 200563
devel/RStudio poudriere build log error

The port of devel/RStudio fails to buil in poudriere on 12/Stable Revision 342267 with error message "too many open files".

Relevant error message from build log:

[100%] Built target rsession
--- src/gwt/CMakeFiles/gwt_build.dir/all ---
    [javac] 2 warnings
     [copy] Copying 1498 files to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/RStudio/work/rstudio-1.2.679/src/gwt/bin
gwtc:
     [java] Dec 27, 2018 4:04:40 PM java.util.prefs.FileSystemPreferences$1 run
     [java] INFO: Created user preferences directory.
     [java] The attempt to retrieve files in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/RStudio/work/rstudio-1.2.679/src/gwt/src failed.
     [java] java.nio.file.FileSystemException: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/RStudio/work/rstudio-1.2.679/src/gwt/src/org/rstudio/studio/client/workbench/views/vcs/svn/images: Too many open files
     [java] 	at sun.nio.fs.UnixException.translateToIOException(UnixException.java:91)
     [java] 	at sun.nio.fs.UnixException.rethrowAsIOException(UnixException.java:102)
     [java] 	at sun.nio.fs.UnixException.rethrowAsIOException(UnixException.java:107)
     [java] 	at sun.nio.fs.UnixFileSystemProvider.newDirectoryStream(UnixFileSystemProvider.java:427)
